topics.query_ar: شرح البرمجة الديناميكية dynamic programming بالعربي
topics.reason: Identifying the correct overlapping subproblems and formulating the mathematical recurrence relation is highly abstract and unintuitive for beginners.

topics.query_en: 0/1 Knapsack problem dynamic programming table trace step by step
topics.query_ar: شرح مسألة حقيبة الظهر knapsack problem برمجة ديناميكية
topics.reason: Building and tracing the 2D DP table while understanding how item weights and values dictate optimal choices requires complex spatial reasoning.

topics.query_en: Warshall's algorithm transitive closure directed graph example
topics.query_ar: شرح خوارزمية وارشال Warshall algorithm بالعربي
topics.reason: Visualizing how intermediate vertices connect paths across a boolean adjacency matrix involves tricky nested loop logic.

topics.topic_ar: منطق العقد الوسيطة في خوارزمية فلويد-وارشال
topics.query_en: Floyd-Warshall algorithm all pairs shortest path intermediate node logic
topics.query_ar: شرح خوارزمية فلويد وارشال Floyd-Warshall بالعربي
topics.reason: Keeping track of distance updates across multiple matrix iterations and understanding the outermost k-loop (intermediate nodes) is cognitively demanding.

topics.topic_en: Optimal Binary Search Trees (OBST) Cost Calculation

topics.query_en: Optimal Binary Search Tree dynamic programming matrix example
topics.query_ar: شرح Optimal Binary Search Tree بالعربي
topics.reason: Calculating the minimum search cost requires iterating over varying chain lengths and roots, making the table filling process extremely tedious and prone to index errors.
